Silvery War Axe  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item Placeable

Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35

an elite honor guard

Permafrost Keep


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
great newbee weapon
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 7:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250871744
274 posts
since in eq your skill goes up according to how much you do a thing, weapons like this with low delay and relativly low damage are great for rasing skill. This weapon is usable as a primary until the mid teens and then can be move to the off hand to rase your duel weild skill

killed an elite guard for this

guy was a puss

first newbie to poke me, gets it

# Jul 13 2003 at 12:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791603019
55 posts
/poke!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
▲ Page top
A GM event
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 9:17 AM Rating: Decent
Crywolf
5 posts
Well, I was helping a few ppl track down a few mobs for the new quests in Misty Thicket, when some Dark Elf starting yelling at the ppl of RV. First mistake was to walk up to him to see what was going on, so after a few hundred HP's off me, I thought it was time to run ( dru's always have sow ) Long story short, medded back up, big crowd to see what going on. This GM really starts giving it to me, ( at lvl 34 he was yellow to me ) invised so no one could see him, even though he was attacking me ( GM thing i guess) ok now the short part, everyone was healing me, casting DS's on me, and after 10 min of being a scratching post, he died, LOOT 26pp and this AXE. ( boohoo ) The axe is nice, so my new lvl 1 halfling Rogue ( after 5 train points in 1hs) hits for 12 smackers....

then end, BTY he killed a lot of newbies, which wasnt that cool
▲ Page top
Good 1H Slash Trainer - Speedy and Lightweight
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2002 at 4:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
As a paladin who has to carry two sets of weapons for 1H and 2H slashing, weight is an important factor. At 2.5 stones, this has got to be one of the lighter weapons available at this level. Add the low delay rate and this weapon becomes a decent 1H slash trainer.
▲ Page top

HEY i was level 5 on Trib server when i got this from some barb war in WFP we dueled for a little bit he wasnt trying and i was running around him and getting behind him alot so then we just got bored and gave me this since i seemed like a good dueler i guess

__DEL__1591763347429

I'm a lvl 16 ranger on Fennin Ro. Is there anyone on that server willing to sell for a reasonable price? I'm willing to haggle. Either email me at purrkat2@yahoo.com with "Silvery War Axe" as the subject, or send a tell to Aelaea or Sillu if you see me. We're both members of Everlasting Dragons.

QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2001 at 3:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248236282
12 posts
Yeah I really get tired of reading these posts from people who obviously haven't been playing the game very long. This was a good weapon back when Kunark hadn't even come out. People would use this into their 30's as a good off hand weapon. It's still good in my opinon. Everyone has such a distorted veiw of things now that everyone is running around with haste gear and 18 delay weapons. I say to all of you... use the Langseax proudly!! I still have one somewhere =D

Hammar Stonefist
54 warrior
▲ Page top
RE: this weapon sucks get a jade mace
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2001 at 2:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763878907
258 posts
I have one of these in my off hand. I like it. It's nothing special but it replaced my crystal fiber well. I am a rogue with a slime coated harpoon (no, not a twinkie, in the right place at the right time with a high lvl nice person, got it for 300pp) in my primary. This weapon works my 1hs skill and duel wield AND deals out a good amount of bonus damage. No, I wouldn't depend on this for great damage, just fill in that secondary.
▲ Page top
This is nice but......
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2001 at 11:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
As a warrior, I can use the Langseax that is 6 dam and 23 delay for less than 20 pp. I was able to purchase a Langseax at a much lower level than I could ever dream of purchasing this thing and the Langseax is not a lore item (so you can have tow) and they can be used in either hand. Dual Langseax's, and I kick butt with them too. Good weapon for the Ranger, Paladin, SK, Bard and Rogue but as a warrior, go wit the Langseax and save your Plat for armor.

# Apr 09 2001 at 3:36 PM Rating: Excellent

Anonymous

# Feb 23 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yeah, this is only a hair better than a Langseax. I'm hanging onto my Langseax, though, for dual wield...if I don't find a good 1hb to use also. (Langseax and Silvery War Axe...call me Titus of Gaul, anyone?)

Of course, mine was 50pp, not 117, so I might be biased by the relative cheapness. It's definitely not worth 100 plat.

Gendacea
Warrior of the 12th rank
Crusaders of Drunken Might

Only when Duel Weilding
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 05 2001 at 2:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well duh, only when dual wielding. some people are just dumb, then there are the REALLY dumb people. i like to consider myself inbetween and you at the bottom.
RE: will go in either melee
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2002 at 5:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250616045
35 posts
You don't have to be dual-wielding in order to put this in your off-hand slot. Please, people, be specific.

This weapon can go in either main-hand or off-hand. Nothing needs to be placed in the main-hand in order for this to go in your off-hand.

The "dual-wield" conversation is relegated to, "yes, this weapon only swings upon a successful check of your dual-wield skill"... but that goes for all off-hand weapons.
▲ Page top
RE: will go in either melee
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2003 at 11:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783965906
235 posts
Moron, yes you DO need dual wield, as if you try to put a weapon in offhand w/o dual wield, it wont go in. Otherwise you'd see more paladins and shadowknights running around with two weapons! Get your facts straight.
